mapper.select: SELECT * FROM `通讯录表` WHERE `所属用户` = #{userId} ORDER BY `编号` DESC
SELECT * FROM `通讯录表` WHERE `编号` = #{id} AND `所属用户` = #{userId}
SELECT * FROM `通讯录表` WHERE `所属用户` = #{userId} AND (`姓名` LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR `电话` LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR `邮箱地址` LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%')) ORDER BY `编号` DESC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO `通讯录表` (`姓名`, `性别`, `通讯地址`, `邮箱地址`, `电话`, `所属用户`) VALUES (#{name}, #{gender}, #{address}, #{email}, #{phone}, #{userId})
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM `通讯录表` WHERE `编号` = #{id} AND `所属用户` = #{userId}
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM `通讯录表` WHERE `电话` = #{phone} AND `所属用户` = #{userId}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM `通讯录表` WHERE `电话` = #{phone} AND `所属用户` = #{userId} AND `编号` != #{excludeId}
